title: sphaeranthus ukambensis var. dauensis
intro: Sphaeranthus ukambensis var. dauensis, also known as the Dauess Sphaeranthus or African Needle Bush, is a plant species within the Sphaeranthus genus, characterized by its unique needle-like leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus ukambensis var. dauensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or by combining them with other herbs to create teas or tinctures.
